commands.narrative:
## 2026-06-06 Daily Report

**No roster changes since yesterday** (144 strategies both days; 138 enabled).

### Headline: Pipeline Stalled — Only 5 Trades Today

diagnose.json verdict is PIPELINE_STALLED: last T+30 callback fired 986 seconds before the snapshot. All four data-quality levels (graduation detection, price capture, timestamps, label logic) pass — the bot is receiving graduations (last: 5s ago at snapshot time) — but the PriceCollector to StrategyManager callback wiring has gone silent. Today collected 5 trades from 1 graduation (net +0.26 SOL); yesterday ran 1,379 trades. Today's readiness scores reflect yesterday's accumulated totals.

**Operator action needed**: restart or inspect the T+30 callback pipeline. This appears to be the third mid-session stall this week (also observed Jun 3 and Jun 5).

### Top Promotion Candidates (no change from yesterday)

Using yesterday's accumulated scores since today's data is minimal:

| Strategy | Score | n | drop_top3 | monthly | edge flag |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono | 88.8 | 96 | +0.979 SOL | +2.97 SOL/mo | STRENGTHENING |
| v9shadow-velmono-dev | 87.2 | 94 | +0.768 SOL | +2.11 SOL/mo | STRENGTHENING |
| v25-bot-excl-climbing | 81.5 | 592 | +0.217 SOL | +3.32 SOL/mo | — |

No strategy clears all four gates today. The v9 shadow pair both have positive drop_top3 (real edge, not lottery-driven) and are STRENGTHENING, but both fall short on monthly run rate (<3.75 SOL/mo) and n<100. v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono is 4 trades from the n>=100 gate; v9shadow-velmono-dev is 6 trades away.

v25-bot-excl-climbing's monthly rate of 3.32 SOL/mo is 0.43 SOL/mo below the promotion bar. The watch from ai-2026-06-02-006 remains valid; re-evaluate once the pipeline recovers.

### v9shadow-vel20-top5 Now INVALID

v9shadow-vel20-top5 crossed n=100 and failed: n=102, total_net_sol=+2.060, **drop_top3=−0.990 SOL**. The apparent +2 SOL profit concentrates in the top-3 trades (top3_contribution_pct=148%). Edge-decay flag is DECAYING: recent-30 median collapsed to −11.67% vs all-time −1.48%. INVALID on the leave-one-out gate. Recommend killing v9shadow-vel20-top5.

### Edge Decay Sweep

20 strategies are flagged DECAYING. The list concentrates in the vel20-top5 lineage (v9shadow-vel20-top5, v26-vel20-top5-ttp, v28-vel20-top5-1s-ttp), the bot-excl-climbing variants (v32, v33, v34, v40-top5-tight), and v35/v39 speculative experiments. The two STRENGTHENING exceptions worth noting: v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono (recent30=+5.28%) and v9shadow-velmono-dev (recent30=+4.75%) — both on the velmono/velmid lineage.

### Stale Kill Batches (4–5 Cycles Unanswered)

Four kill-item batches from Jun 2–5 remain PROPOSED and unexecuted. The roster carries approximately 40+ INVALID strategies that collectively drag the daily shadow P&L to −60 to −120 SOL/day. The most urgent batch is the v32/v28/v33/v34 climbing-cluster kill (escalated 3 times, most recently ai-2026-06-05-001). Recommend the operator execute at least this batch to remove the largest noise contributors.

### 7-Day Pattern

Recent daily aggregate profits: −90.7 (Jun 5), −58.9 (Jun 4), −121.1 (Jun 3), +20.9 (Jun 2), −33.3 (Jun 1), −63.5 (May 31), −20.6 (May 30). The Jun 2 positive (+20.9 SOL) coincides with n=2 trades and is likely an outlier. The chronic negative drag is structural: 100+ negative-expectancy strategies each losing 10–25% per 0.5 SOL position. Clearing the kill backlog is the single highest-leverage operational action this cycle.

### Operator Priority Order

1. **Fix pipeline stall** — investigate PriceCollector to StrategyManager T+30 wiring.
2. **Execute pending kill batches** — start with ai-2026-06-05-001 (v32/v28/v33/v34) and ai-2026-06-02-004 (v41/v42 families).
3. **After pipeline recovers** — check v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono for n=100 promotion eligibility (4 trades away at last count).

anomalies.detail: T+30 callback last fired 986s ago. PriceCollector to StrategyManager wiring silent. Only 5 trades from 1 graduation today vs 1379 yesterday.
20 strategies flagged DECAYING. Most critically: v9shadow-vel20-top5 (n=102, DECAYING, drop_top3=-0.990) — now INVALID. Also: v40-whale-cap, v26-vel20-top5-ttp, v35-vel2050-buyers-ratio.
45 strategies have not traded in 49+ hours due to selective filter gates. Pipeline confirmed feeding (confirmed by graduation detection being live).

patterns.description: v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono and v9shadow-velmono-dev are the only two enabled strategies consistently STRENGTHENING. Both share vel 20-50 + quality-filter lineage and have positive drop_top3.
4 kill batches from Jun 2-5 remain unexecuted (40+ strategies). Combined drag estimated -70 to -100 SOL/day in paper accounting. No strategy removed since Jun 2 session.
20 enabled strategies flagged DECAYING as of 2026-06-06. Concentrated in vel20-top5 lineage and climbing-cluster variants. DECAYING flag corroborates INVALID verdict from leave-one-out.
Third mid-session pipeline stall this week (Jun 3, Jun 5, Jun 6). T+30 callbacks go silent while graduation detection continues. Suggests a fragile PriceCollector subscription or reconnect path.

n=94, score=87.2, drop_top3=+0.768, STRENGTHENING. 6 trades from n=100. Monthly=2.11 SOL/mo (below bar). Fat-tail strategy — drop_top3 is the primary robustness check.
n=592, score=81.5, drop_top3=+0.217, monthly=3.32 (gap: -0.43 to bar). Largest sample of any positive drop_top3 strategy. Monthly trend determines promotion timeline.

action_items.summary: Kill v9shadow-vel20-top5 — cleared n=100 and failed: drop_top3=-0.990 SOL (lottery-driven, 148% top3 concentration), DECAYING (recent-30 median -11.67%). INVALID.

Recurring pipeline stall: T+30 callback last fired 986s before Jun 6 snapshot (third occurrence this week). PriceCollector to StrategyManager wiring goes silent while graduations continue. Needs restart or connection fix.
